news.t: Lean on Active Management for Small-Cap Value Success

holdings.infoBox: ACSV is an equity ETF with a total of 202 individual holdings. The top holdings are Meritage Homes stock at 1.95%, Old National Bancorp at 1.95%, Provident Financial Services at 1.91%, Columbia Banking System at 1.77%, and Euronet Worldwide at 1.71%.

overview.description: The American Century Small Cap Value Insights ETF (ACSV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is an actively managed ETF focused on US small-cap companies considered high quality and trading below estimated fair value. The fund seeks long-term capital growth through fundamental analysis and a disciplined, risk-aware investment process ACSV was launched on Oct 16, 2025 and is issued by American Century Investments.

data.title: Lean on Active Management for Small-Cap Value Success
data.text: Small-cap stocks are displaying leadership and value equities. The related ETFs are participating in that trend, renewing investors' faith in the long potent small-cap value combination.
